items.title: How to Verify Email Addresses Programmatically: SMTP, MX, and API-Based Validation Explained
items.description: Bad email addresses in a signup form don't just clutter your database, they wreck deliverability. A high bounce rate signals to mailbox providers like Gmail and Outlook that your sending domain isn't trustworthy, and that reputation hit follows every email you send afterward, not just the bad one

items.title: Lesson 1 - TDD with AI: getting tests that hold up when the agent writes them
items.description:
I let the agent write the tests as it built the features. They passed. I ran them, tested by hand, everything green, let it commit. For a while that felt great.
